steps.title: Identify input and output
steps.content: The function $A(b)$ takes the base length $b$ as the input and returns the triangle's area as the output.

steps.title: Interpret the function value
steps.content: In $A(17)=1{,}734$, the input is $17$, so the base is $17$ centimeters. The output is $1{,}734$, so the area is $1{,}734$ square centimeters. The answer is C.
